svg.title: Project 03 – Real-Time Blockchain Transaction Monitor Architecture
svg.desc: White and navy architecture diagram for the real-time blockchain transaction monitor.
svg.text: PROJECT 03 — REAL-TIME BLOCKCHAIN TRANSACTION MONITOR // ARCHITECTURE
- Hosted node – no self-run node needed
- Polled on interval for live price
- ETH/USD used in all value displays
- All value displays use live price
- Passes enriched TX to analysis layer
Bug fixed: duplicate dict keys (ruff F601)
- DFS cycle detection on live TX graph
- Schema applied once on first run
- Mode A: real scrolling TX feed
- TX 22: HIGH_GAS high – 312 gwei vs 18 baseline
